title: Anarchy & Self-Organizing Work
subtitle: What citizens do before you have a government

pages.text: Before you adopt a government you are in &6anarchy&r. Citizens are not idle or hostile — they auto-employ into the basic gatherer jobs you have unlocked, working tool-free but more slowly than a directed worker would.
Anarchy is the self-organizing baseline, not a punishment. It keeps a young tribe fed and supplied while you decide how to govern.
Adopting a government (Chiefdom or Council) lets you give direct orders: pin specific citizens to specific jobs, mark their work areas, and supply them with tools so they work faster.
